segments.text: Caught him! Caught him at 126%, Carmelo!
segments.original_text: ああああああ 捕らえた捕らえた126%あり、カルメロ

segments.text: Sets up advantage and from there—look! Gets the bair! Reading the mashing perfectly!
segments.original_text: がとりあえずダイヤ作ってでからの、どう、空後とれたここで流れを暴れも読んで

segments.text: Even though he was below Sonic the whole time...
segments.original_text: どこだって ソニック下にいたのに

full_text: Caught him! Caught him at 126%, Carmelo! Sets up advantage and from there—look! Gets the bair! Reading the mashing perfectly! Even though he was below Sonic the whole time... But still...

corrections.original: ダイヤ作ってでからのどう くれ宇宙とれた
corrections.corrected: ダイヤ作ってでからの、どう、空後とれた

corrections.original: トニック下にいたのに
corrections.corrected: ソニック下にいたのに
